violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Qdoba was using running water, however, product was not submerged in water to allow even thawing temp

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface was not disassembled for proper cleaning. -Qdoba - Line cutting boards were not moved and had build up between stainless steel and cutting board.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Qdoba - Pull out cooler on area of line not in use had liquid pooling. Suggest cleaning. -Qdoba - Tilt Kettle cookers. Left one had black beans in drain spout.--Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Qdoba - Vulcan hot hold in need of cleaning interior floor. -Qdoba - Cleaning required under cooking equipment on line.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Market self-serve - iced coffee/slushy machine dispensers have sticky build up in nozzles. Need cleaning

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Rear dry storage area has three boxes of single-use items stored on the floor. -Invert single service items in BOH prep area near office.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Qdoba - line hand wash sink had a jammed paper towel dispenser. -Qdoba - No key for paper towel dispenser in kitchen area. Dispenser was empty. -Simply Servings - Hand sink blocked by racks/equipment.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Employee bathrooms by simply fresh prep room in need of sweeping/mopping.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Qdoba - Walk-In cooler floors have multiple areas in need of cleaning. -Walls and floors in each kitchen need a deep clean -Dish Wash room has build up under machines and along wall. Need cleaning
